name: io.github.mnymann/nordic-data
description: Nordic Data — European B2B data for AI agents. Company lookup, full KYB reports, sanctions/PEP screening, VAT validation, LEI lookup, and address autocomplete across 12 EU countries (DK, NO, SE, FI, IE, UK, FR, DE, CZ, PL, LV, EE). GDPR-compliant. Sources: CVR, Brønnøysund, Bolagsverket, YTJ, CRO, Companies House, INSEE, Handelsregister, ARES, KAS/KRS, Uzņēmumu reģistrs, Ariregister, VIES, HMRC, OpenSanctions, GLEIF.

environmentVariables.name: NORDIC_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Your Nordic Data API key — get one at https://addonnordic.com
